summary: Comprehensive testing of Cloléo marketplace e-commerce application completed successfully. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend UI fully functional with proper African marketplace branding, 8 categories, product listings, cart functionality, and search.

design_issues.issue: Condition and location filter checkboxes not found in desktop view, might be using different implementation

passed_tests: All 8 categories loading correctly with images and product counts
Product listings in category pages (20 products found in Mode-Textile)
Product page with details, gallery, similar products, also-bought sections
Add to cart functionality with toast notifications
Cart page with quantity controls and FCFA/USD totals
Prices displaying in both FCFA and USD
Hero section with proper African marketplace branding
